name: meta-workflow
description: Toolkit for authoring and improving Claude Code assets. The agent-skill-reviewer agent reviews subagent and skill definition files (.claude/agents/<name>.md, SKILL.md) for trigger quality, internal coherence, and routing overlap with siblings — read-only, returns a report. The retro skill runs an offline retrospective over your past sessions, distilling recurring friction into durable fixes (memories, CLAUDE.md rules, hooks). Complements dev-workflow, which targets application code; this one targets the Claude Code tooling itself.
